2605.29992.title: Adapting Multilingual Embedding Models to Turkish via Cross-Lingual Tokenizer Surgery and Offline Distillation
2605.29992.paper_summary: Sentence embeddings are a foundational component for semantic search, clustering, classification, and retrieval-augmented generation. This paper presents embeddingmagibu-200m, a Turkish-focused sentence embedding model that produces 768-dimensional L2-normalized vectors and supports an 8,192-token context window, far exceeding the 512-token limit of earlier BERT-based Turkish encoders. Instead of full pretraining, an efficient three-stage adaptation pipeline is introduced: (1) construct a Turkish-optimized multilingual tokenizer with a 131,072 vocabulary by pruning redundant tokens from the teacher's vocabulary and incorporating multilingual tokens via frequency analysis on a 40-language corpus, (2) clone a teacher embedding model while preserving transformer backbone weights and initializing a compatible embedding table for the new vocabulary via mean-composition token mapping, and (3) perform offline embedding distillation from precomputed teacher vectors using a cosine similarity objective over a balanced 40-language Wikipedia corpus. The resulting student model contains approximately 200M parameters and trains in roughly four hours on a single GPU by avoiding online teacher inference during training, at a total cost of $5-$20. Empirically, Pearson/Spearman correlations of 77.55%/77.45% are obtained on STSbTR, surpassing the 300M-parameter teacher model (73.84%/72.92%). On TR-MTEB (26 tasks), a mean score of 63.9% is achieved (7th out of 26 models), providing a competitive cost-quality trade-off with 33% fewer parameters than the teacher. To facilitate reproducibility and downstream use, all artifacts are released including model weights, tokenizer files, precomputed embedding datasets, and open-source cloning and distillation tooling.
2605.29992.paper_summary_zh: 句子嵌入是語義搜索、聚類、分類和檢索增強生成的基礎組件。本文介紹了embeddingmagibu-200m，這是一個以土耳其語為重點的句子嵌入模型，能生成768維的L2正規化向量，並支持8192個標記的上下文窗口，遠超過早期基於BERT的土耳其語編碼器的512個標記限制。本文引入了一個高效的三階段適應管道，取代了完整的預訓練：(1) 構建一個以土耳其語優化的多語言分詞器，擁有131072的詞彙量，通過從教師的詞彙中修剪冗餘標記，並通過對40種語言語料庫的頻率分析來整合多語言標記；(2) 克隆一個教師嵌入模型，同時保留Transformer骨幹權重，並通過均值組合標記映射為新詞彙初始化一個兼容的嵌入表；(3) 使用餘弦相似度目標對預計算的教師向量進行離線嵌入蒸餾，這是在一個平衡的40語言維基百科語料庫上進行的。最終的學生模型包含約2億個參數，並在單個GPU上訓練約四小時，通過在訓練期間避免在線教師推理，總成本為5到20美元。實證結果顯示，STSbTR上的Pearson/Spearman相關性分別為77.55%/77.45%，超過了300M參數的教師模型（73.84%/72.92%）。在TR-MTEB（26個任務）上，達到了63.9%的平均分數（在26個模型中排名第七），提供了與教師相比減少33%參數的競爭性成本-質量權衡。為了促進可重複性和下游使用，所有工件均已發布，包括模型權重、分詞器文件、預計算的嵌入數據集，以及開源的克隆和蒸餾工具。
2605.29992.author: M. Ali Bayram et.al.
2605.29992.authors: M. Ali Bayram, Banu Diri, Savaş Yıldırım
